channel.title: Giant Bombcast
channel.description: Giant Bomb discusses the latest video game news and new releases, taste-test questionable beverages, and get wildly off-topic in this weekly podcast.
channel.itunes:subtitle: Giant Bomb discusses the latest video game news and new releases, taste-test questionable beverages, and get wildly off-topic in this weekly podcast.
channel.itunes:author: Giant Bomb
channel.itunes:summary: Giant Bomb discusses the latest video game news and new releases, taste-test questionable beverages, and get wildly off-topic in this weekly podcast.
channel.itunes:keywords: Hotspot, Hot Spot, Jeff Gerstmann, Brad Shoemaker, video games, video game news, PS3, Xbox360, Nintendo
